competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.raw_snapshot: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Cursor 3 released April 2026 as 'unified workspace for building software with agents'. Version 3.3 released May 6, 2026. Key features: /multitask command for running async subagents to parallelize requests instead of adding them to the queue. Shared canvases: teams can share live snapshots of agent-created reports, dashboards, and interfaces — 'Instead of sharing a full chat thread, you can share a link to a live snapshot of a canvas for teammates to open in the browser.' Composer 2.5 for long-running tasks and complex instructions. Background Agents and Cloud Agents introduced. Automations added to Agents Window with multi-repo and no-repo setups.
competitors.content_hash: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Cursor 3 released April 2026 as 'unified workspace for building software with agents'. Version 3.3 released May 6,

changes.description: Background Agents 和 Cloud Agents 上线，支持在后台自主执行开发任务
changes.evidence: 「Cursor v3.0 in early 2026 introduced Background Agents, Cloud Agents, and a dramatically improved Composer 2.0」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI=快 session，后台自主执行，与 meee2 fast session 概念直接重叠

changes.description: /multitask 命令支持并行异步 subagents，在 editor 内并行化请求
changes.evidence: 「/multitask is now available in the editor for running async subagents to parallelize your requests instead of adding them to the queue」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI parallel session 执行，meee2 fast session 概念的直接竞品实现

changes.description: 共享 Canvas 上线：可分享 agent 创建的 canvas 的 live snapshot 链接给团队成员
changes.evidence: 「you can share a link to a live snapshot of a canvas for teammates to open in the browser」
changes.meee2_relevance: 接近锚点 #2：'live snapshot' 是 snapshot 语义，但向 live link 演化的信号；团队共享 artifact 触碰锚点 #4

changes.description: Cursor 3 重新定位为 'unified workspace for building software with agents'
changes.evidence: 「Cursor 3 is a unified workspace for building software with agents, released in April 2026」
changes.meee2_relevance: 整体定位向 meee2 的 'workspace for human+AI sessions' 概念收拢

key_findings: Cursor 3 正式定位为 'unified workspace for agents'，与 meee2 的 session workspace 叙事直接竞争
共享 Canvas 以 'live snapshot' 形式上线，是向 meee2 live link 锚点迈近的最强信号
/multitask 异步 subagents 是 AI parallel session 的具体实现

competitors.name: Claude.ai
competitors.raw_snapshot: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Live Artifacts introduced April 2026: dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them, 'they stay connected to data sources', useful for KPI monitoring, pipeline tracking, content calendars. Artifacts can now call Claude API directly — 'build intelligent micro-applications where the AI runs inside the artifact itself'. Artifacts support MCP servers, enabling direct connections to Google Calendar, Gmail, Slack and more. MCP connects to over 6,000 apps as of March 2026. Computer Use shipped March 23 (research preview, macOS only, Pro and Max): Claude can point, click, navigate screen. Chat features: Fork, /btw, /rewind, /recap, Claude Design, Inline Interactive Charts. Code features: Routines, /ultrareview, Auto Mode, Ultrathink, Subagents, Hooks, Plugins.
competitors.content_hash: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Live Artifacts introduced April 2026: dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen t

changes.description: Live Artifacts 上线：持续连接数据源，每次打开自动刷新，支持 KPI 监控、管道追踪等实时场景
changes.evidence: 「Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them. They stay connected to data sources」
changes.meee2_relevance: 直接命中锚点 #2：跨工具 artifact live link（非 snapshot）。这是迄今竞品中最接近 meee2 live link 概念的实现

changes.description: Artifacts 内可直接调用 Claude API，支持 AI 运行在 artifact 内部构建智能微应用
changes.evidence: 「Artifacts can now call Claude's API directly, which means you can build intelligent micro-applications where the AI runs inside the artifact itself」
changes.meee2_relevance: 接近锚点 #3（descriptive canvas / artifact as living entity）；AI 在 artifact 内部运行是 self-contained session 的早期形态

changes.description: MCP 集成扩展至 6000+ 应用，支持 Google Drive、Slack、GitHub、Jira、Notion、Figma 等
changes.evidence: 「as of March 2026, it connects to over 6,000 apps through integrations with services like Google Drive, Slack, GitHub, Jira, Notion, Stripe, Figma, and Zapier」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull 的基础设施层，规模扩展至 6000+ 应用显著降低 Claude.ai 替代 meee2 跨工具整合的门槛

changes.description: Routines 功能上线（Claude Code），支持定义可复用的自动化执行序列
changes.evidence: 「Code got Routines, /ultrareview, Auto Mode, Ultrathink, Subagents, Hooks, and Plugins」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：Routines 是对 AI session 的程序化重用，与 meee2 fast session 的可复用协议概念重叠

changes.description: Computer Use 上线（macOS 研究预览版），Claude 可直接操控屏幕
changes.evidence: 「Computer Use shipped March 23, research preview, macOS only, for Claude Pro and Max subscribers. Claude can now point, click, and navigate your screen」
changes.meee2_relevance: 接近锚点 #5（Peripheral 层）：Claude 直接操控 macOS 屏幕，是对 meee2 菜单栏/peripheral 层的直接竞争路径

key_findings: Live Artifacts 是最高级别信号：artifacts 持续连接数据源（非 snapshot），直接命中 meee2 锚点 #2
MCP 扩展至 6000+ 应用，跨工具 artifact pull 基础设施规模远超 meee2 当前水平
Computer Use（macOS）+ Routines + Subagents 合并，Claude.ai 正在构建完整的 peripheral + session 协议层

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
# GitHub Copilot: Key Features & Capabilities

Agent Capabilities: Autonomous Task Execution: 'Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them plan, explore, and execute work autonomously'. Multi-Agent Support: deployment of Copilot agents alongside Claude and Codex, allowing teams to leverage multiple AI assistants concurrently. Cloud Agent Features: 'Enterprise users can access Copilot cloud agents for background task management and workflow automation across development environments.' Copilot Spaces: 'Turn Copilot into a project expert by creating shared knowledge repositories that consolidate documentation and codebase context for team consistency.' Terminal Workflow: 'Direct Copilot in the terminal using natural language and watch it plan, build, and execute complex workflows'. Enterprise: Single control plane for tracking agent activity with detailed audit logs. MCP Server Security: Administrators can restrict which MCP integrations developers access through allow-listing. Usage Monitoring: Organizations can establish budgets and track premium request consumption.
competitors.content_hash:
# GitHub Copilot: Key Features & Capabilities

Agent Capabilities: Autonomous Task Execution: 'Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by A

changes.description: Cloud Agents 显式上线：企业用户可使用 Copilot cloud agents 进行后台任务管理和工作流自动化
changes.evidence: 「Enterprise users can access Copilot cloud agents for background task management and workflow automation across development environments」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：Cloud Agents 后台执行是 AI fast session 的企业级实现，在开发环境内形成完整的 AI session 管理层

changes.description: Copilot Spaces 表述从上期的「scale knowledge and keep teams consistent」回归「Turn Copilot into a project expert」
changes.evidence: 「Turn Copilot into a project expert by creating shared knowledge repositories that consolidate documentation and codebase context for team consistency」
changes.meee2_relevance: 上期报告中 'shared source of truth' 表述是更强的 meee2 锚点 #4 信号；此次回归 'project expert' 表述，威胁信号轻微收缩

changes.description: MCP 安全管控上线：企业管理员可通过 allow-list 机制限制开发者可访问的 MCP 服务器
changes.evidence: 「Administrators can restrict which Model Context Protocol integrations developers access through allow-listing mechanisms」
changes.meee2_relevance: MCP 治理层完善，配合集中控制平面，GitHub 正在构建完整的企业级 AI tool integration 管控体系

key_findings: Cloud Agents 显式可用于后台任务管理，AI session 后台执行能力在企业开发场景落地
Copilot Spaces 定位小幅回归 'project expert' 叙事，上期报告中的 'shared source of truth' 威胁信号有所收缩
MCP allow-listing 完善企业级 AI tool integration 管控

competitors.name: Linear
competitors.raw_snapshot: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Linear Agent public beta launched March 2026, available for all teams, included on all plans. Features: save conversation result as reusable skill for recurring workflows (catching up on projects, drafting issues from meeting notes). Trigger agent workflows automatically when issues enter triage. Code Intelligence (May 2026): extends Linear Agent's understanding to codebase, code-aware tasks like diagnosing app functionality and designing technical specs. AI Coding Tool Integration (Feb 2026): launch coding tool from Linear issue with prefilled prompt including issue ID and all relevant context. Linear Releases (April 2026): generate release notes with Linear Agent based on included issues; integrates with CI/CD tools to track deployment status, auto-updates issue statuses when code lands in production. Project Slack Channels (May 2026): Linear auto-spins up Slack channel when new project created, all project members added, Linear Agent can answer questions or take actions in the channel.
competitors.content_hash: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Linear Agent public beta launched March 2026, available for all teams, included on all plans. Features: save conver

changes.description: Linear Agent 公测上线：支持将对话结果保存为可复用 Skills，适用于重复性工作流
changes.evidence: 「When a conversation gets you to a good result, you can ask Linear to save it as a reusable skill, which is especially useful for recurring workflows like catching up on projects or drafting issues from meeting notes」
changes.meee2_relevance: 接近锚点 #1：reusable skill for recurring workflows 是 session-level 记忆的早期形态；与 meee2 fast session 的可复用协议概念结构类似

changes.description: Code Intelligence：Linear Agent 获得代码库理解能力，支持代码感知任务
changes.evidence: 「Code Intelligence extends Linear Agent's understanding to your codebase, supporting code-aware tasks like diagnosing app functionality and designing technical specifications」
changes.meee2_relevance: 面向开发场景的 agent 上下文扩展，不直接触碰 meee2 核心锚点，但增强了 Linear 在开发工作流中的 AI 粘性

changes.description: Project Slack 频道自动创建，Linear Agent 可在频道内回答问题和执行操作
changes.evidence: 「Linear can automatically spin up a Slack channel when a new project is created, with all project members automatically added, and you can use Linear Agent to answer questions or take actions in the project」
changes.meee2_relevance: 跨工具（Linear + Slack）agent 操作，轻微触碰锚点 #4；但这是集成触发而非 live link 协议

key_findings: Linear Agent 公测，Skills 概念（保存为可复用工作流）是向 session-level 记忆演化的信号
Code Intelligence 使 Linear Agent 获得代码感知能力，在开发场景形成更完整的 AI agent 闭环
Project Slack 频道自动创建，Linear Agent 开始跨工具操作

competitors.name: Notion AI
competitors.raw_snapshot: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Notion Developer Platform (May 2026, v3.5): Workers — cloud environment for running custom code deployed to secure sandbox. External Agents API — bring external agents (Claude, Codex, Decagon) into Notion working out of the box. Database Sync — pull data from any database with API; pre-configured integrations: Linear, Figma, HubSpot, Ramp, Wiz, Stripe, GitHub, Intercom, Amplitude, Attio, Sentry. CLI for developers and coding agents. Custom Agent controls for admins (May 5): manage who can create Custom Agents and spending limits. Custom Agents can now read and reply in private Slack channels. TechCrunch headline: 'Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents' (May 2026).
competitors.content_hash: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Notion Developer Platform (May 2026, v3.5): Workers — cloud environment for running custom code deployed to secu

changes.description: External Agents API：可将 Claude、Codex 等外部 agent 引入 Notion workspace
changes.evidence: 「The External Agents API allows users to bring favorite agents into Notion, with partnerships including Claude, Codex, Decagon, and others working out of the box」
changes.meee2_relevance: Notion 作为 agent hub 而非 session 协议层；外部 agent 进入 Notion 是向 cross-tool 方向延伸，但 Notion 是文档目的地，不是 session 协调协议

changes.description: Database Sync 上线：可从任意有 API 的数据库拉取数据至 Notion，含 Linear、GitHub、Figma 等预配置集成
changes.evidence: 「The database sync feature can pull in data from any database with an API. Pre-configured partner integrations include Linear, Figma, HubSpot, GitHub」
changes.meee2_relevance: 轻触锚点 #4（跨工具数据拉取），但实现为数据库同步而非 session-level artifact live link

changes.description: Notion 明确定位为 'hub for AI agents'，战略方向从知识库向 AI agent coordination layer 转移
changes.evidence: 「Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents」（TechCrunch, May 2026）
changes.meee2_relevance: 'AI agent hub' 定位与 meee2 的 session workspace 有叙事重叠；但 Notion 仍以文档为中心，不是 session 协议层

key_findings: Notion Developer Platform 使 Notion 成为 AI agent 的 hub，External Agents API 引入 Claude、Codex 等直接操作 Notion
Database Sync 扩展跨工具数据拉取能力，但实现为同步而非 live link
Notion 整体定位从知识库向 'AI agent hub' 演化，与 meee2 叙事的距离在缩小

competitors.name: Slack
competitors.raw_snapshot: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Generate AI Response step for Workflows (April 2026): AI native in any Slack workflow — add step, write prompt, point at knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists). Rolling out Business+ v2 and Enterprise+. New Slackbot AI Agent (generally available): fully rebuilt, can search enterprise data, draft documents, take action on behalf of employees. Multi-agent coordination: 'Slackbot can now coordinate multiple agents in real-time — pings Analytics Agent to visualize adoption data and a Sales Agent to pull relevant success stories. When you ask for an expansion plan, Slackbot automatically drafts an account strategy canvas.' Developer tools: 'slack create agent' command, enhanced Bolt framework, bring-your-own-LLM, Claude SDK/OpenAI SDK/Pydantic AI support. Admin AI exclusion controls. Salesforce positioning Slack as 'center of the emerging agentic AI movement'.
competitors.content_hash: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Generate AI Response step for Workflows (April 2026): AI native in any Slack workflow — add step, write prompt, poi

changes.description: Slackbot 重构为完整 AI Agent：可搜索企业数据、起草文档、代表用户执行操作
changes.evidence: 「transforming it from a simple notification tool into a fully powered AI agent capable of searching enterprise data, drafting documents, and taking action on behalf of employees」
changes.meee2_relevance: Slackbot 成为 action-taking agent；在 comms 层实现 agent session，但缺乏 meee2 的 session 协议和 peripheral 层概念

changes.description: 多 agent 协调 + 自动起草 canvas：Slackbot 可实时协调多个专用 agent，自动生成策略 canvas
changes.evidence: 「Slackbot can now coordinate multiple agents in real-time: it pings an Analytics Agent to visualize adoption data and a Sales Agent to pull relevant success stories. Slackbot automatically drafts an account strategy canvas」
changes.meee2_relevance: 轻触锚点 #1（multi-agent coordination）；但 Slack 的多 agent 是基于 channel/canvas 的文档工作流，不是 session 协议层

changes.description: Salesforce 将 Slack 定位为 'center of the emerging agentic AI movement'
changes.evidence: 「Salesforce's most aggressive move yet to position Slack at the center of the emerging 'agentic AI' movement」
changes.meee2_relevance: 叙事重叠：Slack 争夺 'agentic AI coordination layer' 定位；但实现范式（channel-centric comms）与 meee2（session protocol）有根本差异

key_findings: Slackbot 全面 AI agent 化，可代表用户操作和实时协调多个专用 agent
Salesforce 明确争夺 'agentic AI center' 定位，与 meee2 叙事领域的竞争加剧
多 agent 协调 + canvas 起草是最接近 meee2 territory 的功能，但仍局限在 comms/document 范式

competitors.name: Reflect
competitors.raw_snapshot: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] AI model choice: GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet now available. Tasks manager: simple aggregation of tasks across notes, create and check off tasks. AI summaries auto-generated when saving a link (enhances semantic search). Image sync: available offline, sync when back online, zoom on iOS. AI palette editor on mobile. Connect iCloud calendar to add events to Reflect. Real-time sync across iOS and desktop, online and offline. No major AI agent or session features identified in 2026 update cycle beyond model upgrades and UX polish.
competitors.content_hash: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] AI model choice: GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet now available. Tasks manager: simple aggregation of tasks across no

changes.description: AI 模型选择：新增 GPT-4o 和 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 支持
changes.evidence: 「Reflect's AI tools now offer users the option to use either GPT-4o or Claude 3.5 Sonnet. Reflect has added GPT-4o, which makes Reflect's AI voice transcriber, AI assistant and the chat with your notes much faster」

changes.description: Tasks manager：跨笔记任务聚合管理
changes.evidence: 「a tasks manager designed to be a simple aggregation of tasks across notes, where you can create new tasks and check-off completed ones」

key_findings: 2026 更新以模型升级和功能打磨为主，无重大 AI agent 或 session 层功能
与 meee2 核心锚点无结构性重叠，威胁等级维持 md（用户群重叠但范式不同）

competitors.name: Raycast
competitors.raw_snapshot: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Presets renamed to Agents — reused across chats, update once applies everywhere. Memory added: automatic summary Raycast AI builds from conversations over time, picking up on projects, preferences, goals. Skills: give Raycast AI custom instructions and knowledge for frequent tasks; AI Extensions and Skills loaded dynamically when relevant. Profile: personal context jot pad. Tool calls show richer detail with expandable input inspection. Chat auto-archive. Branch off any message. Experimental: MCP HTTP Servers (SSE/Streamable), AI Extensions for Ollama local models. Public beta: new UI, files & folders on root search, AI dictation. iOS and Windows versions in public beta. GitHub Copilot integration: assign issues to Copilot agent from Raycast, monitor Copilot agent logs live in Raycast.
competitors.content_hash: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Presets renamed to Agents — reused across chats, update once applies everywhere. Memory added: automatic summary

changes.description: Memory 上线：Raycast AI 从对话中构建用户上下文摘要，跨对话保留项目、偏好、目标记忆
changes.evidence: 「Memory is an automatic summary Raycast AI builds from your conversations over time, picking up on your projects, preferences, and goals」
changes.meee2_relevance: 接近锚点 #5（Peripheral 层 + 持久上下文）；但 Raycast Memory 是单用户对话记忆，不是跨 session/跨工具的 session 协议

changes.description: Agents + Skills 系统：Presets 升级为 Agents，Skills 提供定制指令和知识，动态按需加载
changes.evidence: 「Presets are now called Agents...Skills have been added so you can give Raycast AI custom instructions and knowledge for the tasks you do often. Skills and AI Extensions are now loaded into the chat dynamically when they're relevant」
changes.meee2_relevance: Agents + Skills + Memory 三要素组合，Raycast 在 peripheral 层（macOS 快速启动器）初具 AI agent 记忆和技能体系，是 meee2 peripheral 锚点 #5 的潜在竞争路径

key_findings: Memory + Agents + Skills 三要素组合，Raycast 在 peripheral 层初具 AI agent 记忆和技能体系
与 meee2 peripheral 层（菜单栏/不切焦点）有范式类似性，但 Raycast 不具备跨工具 session 协调能力
GitHub Copilot 深度集成使 Raycast 成为 coding agent 操控入口

competitors.name: Replit
competitors.raw_snapshot: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Agent 4 released March 2026: Design Freely, Build Together, Ship Anything, Move Faster. Parallel agents: multiple agents tackle different project parts simultaneously (auth, DB logic, backend, frontend). Automatic task decomposition into sub-agents, runs concurrently, merges results with dedicated conflict-resolution sub-agents. Team collaboration: multiple team members submit requests simultaneously, agent intelligently sequences and executes. 'Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent.' Every request broken into discrete background tasks; track status, review results, approve changes before merging. Infinite Canvas for design+engineering gap closure. Agent 4 ships production-ready software up to 10x faster. Replit evolving into 'fully integrated productivity suite' with canvas, apps, sites, slides, videos. 'Knowledge work agent' positioning.
competitors.content_hash: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Agent 4 released March 2026: Design Freely, Build Together, Ship Anything, Move Faster. Parallel agents: multiple a

changes.description: Agent 4 支持团队共享 session：多成员可在同一 agent session 中协作，各自保有独立聊天线程
changes.evidence: 「Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent」
changes.meee2_relevance: 接近锚点 #1：人在 agent 图内 + shared session 概念，与 meee2 的「人=慢 session，AI=快 session，同一协议」有结构相似性；但 Replit 局限于代码构建场景

changes.description: 并行 sub-agents 架构：大任务自动分解，多 agent 并发执行，专用 sub-agent 合并冲突
changes.evidence: 「Agent 4 automatically breaks them into smaller forks, runs them concurrently using sub-agents, and merges the results, resolving any conflicts with dedicated sub-agents」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1 的技术实现层：并行 AI session 协调，但在单一平台（Replit）内闭合，无跨工具协议

changes.description: Replit 定位演化为 'fully integrated productivity suite'，从代码工具向通用 knowledge work 延伸
changes.evidence: 「Replit is evolving into a fully integrated productivity suite, with a canvas, apps, sites, slides, videos, and others」
changes.meee2_relevance: Replit 扩大范围至 'knowledge work'，与 meee2 workspace 定位的叙事距离在收缩；但 Replit 仍以代码构建为核心

key_findings: Agent 4 的 'shared session alongside the agent' 概念是 meee2 锚点 #1 的最接近竞品实现之一（人在 agent 图内）
并行 sub-agents + 自动任务分解是 multi-agent session 协调的具体落地
Replit 定位向 'knowledge work productivity suite' 延伸，与 meee2 的范式距离在缩短

competitors.name: Superwhisper
competitors.raw_snapshot: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Claude Code and Open Code agent integration added in v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS only): pipes voice transcripts into the terminal agent, allows using Superwhisper with Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code, Amp, Codex, or any agentic coding app without keyboard. Redesigned UI with history, full text search, segmented playback, fast load, multi-select delete, upgraded model library. Remote cloud AI models: Gemini and Grok added with enhanced multilingual transcription. Bind each mode to own keyboard shortcut (v2.12.0). New Modes design with dedicated settings view. New Vocabulary & Replacements. Recording retention auto-cleanup. Lower volume option (15% while recording).
competitors.content_hash: [来源：WebSearch，非官方原文] Claude Code and Open Code agent integration added in v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS only): pipes voice transcripts into

changes.description: Claude Code / 编码 agent 集成：语音转录直接 pipe 进终端 agent，支持 Cursor、Claude Code、Amp、Codex 等
changes.evidence: 「Superwhisper added Claude Code and Open Code agent integration in v2.13.0 (April 2026). The integration pipes transcripts into the terminal agent. This allows users to use Superwhisper with Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code, Amp, Codex, or any other agentic coding app, without touching your keyboard」
changes.meee2_relevance: 语音作为 peripheral 输入层的 agent 集成；触碰锚点 #5（Peripheral 层）但仅为输入模态，不具备 session 协调能力

key_findings: Superwhisper 成为编码 agent 的语音输入入口（Cursor、Claude Code 等），peripheral 层功能扩展
与 meee2 的 peripheral 层有输入模态重叠，但无 session 协议和跨工具能力

alerts.headline: Live Artifacts 上线：artifacts 持续连接数据源（非 snapshot），直接命中 meee2 锚点 #2
alerts.evidence: 「Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them. They stay connected to data sources」
alerts.action_suggestion: 最高优先级。Claude Live Artifacts 是目前竞品中最接近 meee2 'artifact live link（非 snapshot）' 锚点的实现。需明确比对差异：meee2 live link 的核心价值是「跨工具、跨 owner、跨 session」，而 Claude Live Artifacts 目前局限于 Claude.ai 内部数据源连接。建议立即更新 meee2 对外差异化叙事，强化 'cross-tool, cross-owner, cross-session' 维度。

alerts.headline: Cursor 3 定位为 'unified workspace for agents'，共享 Canvas + Background Agents 深度覆盖 meee2 锚点 #1/#2
alerts.evidence: 「Cursor 3 is a unified workspace for building software with agents」；「you can share a link to a live snapshot of a canvas for teammates to open in the browser」
alerts.action_suggestion: 持续追踪 Cursor 共享 Canvas 的 'live snapshot' 是否升级为真正的 live link（即 artifact 在链接端实时更新，而非 snapshot 定格）。同时注意 Background Agents + /multitask 已将 AI parallel session 作为一等功能——meee2 应确保在叙事层明确区分「session 协议层」（meee2）vs「编码 IDE 内的 agent 功能」（Cursor）。

alerts.headline: Cloud Agents 用于后台任务管理和工作流自动化，AI session 后台执行在企业开发场景落地
alerts.evidence: 「Enterprise users can access Copilot cloud agents for background task management and workflow automation across development environments」
alerts.action_suggestion: 持续观察 GitHub Cloud Agents 是否从开发环境扩展至通用 workspace。当前仍局限于 development environments，未构成跨工具 session 协议威胁。关注 GitHub 是否将 Cloud Agents 连接至非代码工具（Slack、Notion 等）后形成新的锚点竞争。

alerts.headline: Linear Agent 公测：可将对话保存为可复用 Skills，向 session-level 工作流记忆演化
alerts.evidence: 「When a conversation gets you to a good result, you can ask Linear to save it as a reusable skill, which is especially useful for recurring workflows like catching up on projects or drafting issues from meeting notes」
alerts.action_suggestion: 追踪 Linear Skills 是否演化为跨 session 的工作流记忆层（类似 meee2 session 协议的持久化机制）。目前 Skills 局限于 Linear 内部场景。如果 Linear 将 Skills 开放为跨工具触发（例如从 Slack/GitHub 触发），将构成锚点 #1 的显著威胁。
